module.name: inventory
module.spec: An Item has exactly three fields: Name (string), Quantity (int), and Price (float64). There are no other fields. Items are compared by Name for equality. See storage for how items are stored and validation for how items are validated.

AddItem appends a new item to the store's slice after validating it via ValidateItem. If validation fails, the error is returned and the item is not added. If an item with the same Name already exists, a duplicate error is returned. The store mutex is held during the entire operation.
RemoveItem deletes the item with the given Name from the store's slice. If no item with that Name exists, a NotFound error is returned. The slice is compacted after removal (no gaps).

ListItems returns a copy of all items in the store, sorted alphabetically by Name. The original slice is not exposed (defensive copy). The sort is case-sensitive (uppercase before lowercase). See report summary which uses this output.
